% https://q.uiver.app/#
\begin{tikzcd}[row sep=large]
	{x} & {x_4} & {x_3} & {x_2}
	\arrow["X"', from=1-1, to=1-2]
	\arrow["{X_{n+1,3}}"{description}, curve={height=-60pt}, from=1-1, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{X_{n+1,2}}"{description}, curve={height=-120pt}, Rightarrow, from=1-1, to=1-4]
	\arrow["{\flowM_{4,3}}"', from=1-2, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{\flowM_{4,2}}"{description}, curve={height=-60pt}, from=1-2, to=1-4]
	\arrow["{\flowM_{3,2}}"', from=1-3, to=1-4]
\end{tikzcd}
